narrative:
Upper Scioto Valley Local Sd (Hardin) school district has 2,601 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.5 percentage points.
